title: MTGGoldfish

videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.description:
Summoning Leviathan is going to be a blast as it'll join other leviathans like Sin, Starwinder, and other sea creatures!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-the-leviathans-are-coming
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7306677#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/JvSqC
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/8jtQF
